rulings.Case Title: 11TH & KISSLING STREET TRUST VS. CLARA TRIAIRE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, March 10, 2015, line 15. DEFENDANT CLARA TRIAIRE's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT OVERRULED, 5 days to answer.
